age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, Govt Servant: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: DM in Gastroenterology or equivalent, MD/MS or equivalent postgraduate qualification, One year teaching/research experience in recognized institution after DM/MCh
qualification.details: Essential for super speciality disciplines: A medical Qualification included in the I or II schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. A postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or equivalent. DM in the respective discipline/subject (Gastroenterology). One year teaching and/or research experience after obtaining DM/MCh (or none for 3 years degree).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) post is 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) position at AIIMS Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a DM in Gastroenterology or equivalent, an MD/MS or equivalent postgraduate qualification, and one year of teaching/research experience after DM/MCh.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 50 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,42,506 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to SC/ST categories and for women candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual appointment for the Assistant Professor (Contractual) post.
